script.arcTitle: Switzerland v Algeria: A Two-Goal Passage
script.openingLine: Welcome to Replay, where Switzerland’s round-of-32 meeting with Algeria comes back to life.

moments.spokenLine: Switzerland meet Algeria in the round of 32 at BC Place Vancouver. The replay is under way.
moments.explainer: This sets the scene for the completed knockout match and places it at BC Place Vancouver.

moments.spokenLine: Breel EMBOLO scores for Switzerland, moving the verified score to 1–0.
moments.explainer: This is the first decisive swing, giving Switzerland the lead.

moments.spokenLine: Fares CHAIBI is shown a card for Algeria.
moments.explainer: This is a verified disciplinary moment for Algeria during the opening half.

moments.spokenLine: Switzerland 1–0 Algeria at the interval: a narrow lead, but a lead all the same.
moments.explainer: The half-time score confirms Switzerland remain ahead after the opening goal.

moments.spokenLine: Dan NDOYE scores for Switzerland, moving the verified score to 2–0.
moments.explainer: The second Switzerland goal doubles the advantage and creates a decisive scoreline.

moments.spokenLine: Hicham BOUDAOUI is shown a card for Algeria.
moments.explainer: This is Algeria’s second verified yellow-card moment.

moments.spokenLine: Switzerland 2–0 Algeria. The result is complete.
moments.explainer: The final score confirms Switzerland’s two-goal victory.

chapters.text: At kick-off, Switzerland meet Algeria in the round of 32 at BC Place Vancouver. The replay is under way.
In the 10th minute, Breel EMBOLO scores for Switzerland, moving the verified score to 1–0.
In the 36th minute, Fares CHAIBI is shown a card for Algeria.
At half-time, Switzerland 1–0 Algeria at the interval: a narrow lead, but a lead all the same.
In the 46th minute, Dan NDOYE scores for Switzerland, moving the verified score to 2–0.
In the 72nd minute, Hicham BOUDAOUI is shown a card for Algeria.
At full-time, Switzerland 2–0 Algeria. The result is complete.
